title: Input Depositional Environment Simulation data Schema
description: Defines the input data for a depositional environment simulation.

format.description: Defines the file content for verification purposes.

depositionalEnvironmentModel.description: Depositional environment model used by the simulator.

weights.description: Optional mapping from environment name to prior weight. If omitted, equal weights are used.

params.description: Parameters for the depositional environment simulator.

DESimulatorWeights.description: Optional mapping from environment name to prior weight. If omitted, equal weights are used.

DESimulatorParameters.description: Parameters for the depositional environment simulator.

waterDepth_sigma.description: Standard deviation for waterDepth likelihood (must be > 0).

waterDepth_weight.description: Weight for the water depth likelihood (must be >= 0).

transition_sigma.description: Standard deviation for transition likelihood (must be > 0).

transition_weight.description: Weight for the transition likelihood (must be >= 0).

trend_sigma.description: Standard deviation for distality trend likelihood (must be > 0).

trend_window.description: Number of previous environments used for trend likelihood (must be >= 2).

trend_weight.description: Weight for the distality trend likelihood (must be >= 0).

interval_distance_method.description: Method used to compute distance between waterDepth intervals.
